name: Eater of Millions
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>百万</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よろず</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>喰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>らいのグラットン
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 5 or more cards from your hand, field, and/or Extra Deck, face-down. Gains 100 ATK/DEF for each face-down banished card. Cannot be Tributed, nor used as material for a Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Summon. Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's monster: You can banish that opponent's monster, face-down.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 5 or more cards from your hand, field, and/or Extra Deck, face-down. Gains 100 ATK/DEF for each face-down banished card. Cannot be Tributed, nor used as material for a Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Summon. Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's monster: You can banish that opponent's monster, face-down.
